summary: Frontend testing of Audix Counter Scanner App - CRITICAL BUG FOUND. The mobile virtualized list crashes immediately when items exist. Root cause: react-window 2.x API incompatibility. The code uses react-window 1.x API (itemCount, itemSize, itemData, children) but react-window 2.2.7 uses a completely different API (rowCount, rowHeight, rowProps, rowComponent). Additionally, react-window 2.2.7 is not officially compatible with React 19.

ui_bugs.issue: APP CRASHES when loading locations with existing items. Error: TypeError: Cannot convert undefined or null to object at Object.values. The react-window List component fails because the code passes props using v1.x API (itemData, itemCount, itemSize, children) but react-window 2.2.7 uses v2.x API (rowProps, rowCount, rowHeight, rowComponent).

integration_issues.issue: Cannot complete ANY scan flow because app crashes when navigating to locations with items. Even loading existing locations like WH-B-CS crashes.

virtualized_list_crash.description: Mobile virtualized list crashes on render
evidence: Console error: TypeError: Cannot convert undefined or null to object
Stack trace shows error in react-window's de() function calling Object.values() on undefined rowProps
App shows 'Something went wrong' error boundary screen
Cannot test ANY scanning functionality due to immediate crash

root_cause.issue: API version mismatch between code and library
root_cause.details: ScanItems.jsx uses react-window v1.x API: <FixedSizeList itemCount={} itemSize={} itemData={} children={Row} />. But react-window 2.2.7 expects v2.x API: <List rowCount={} rowHeight={} rowProps={} rowComponent={Row} />

virtualized_list_crash.additional_issue: react-window 2.2.7 peer dependencies only support React 15-18, not React 19

test_scenarios_executed.name: Select location WH-A1 and scan barcode
test_scenarios_executed.result: FAIL - App crashes with TypeError when trying to render scanned items list

test_scenarios_executed.name: Select existing location WH-B-CS
test_scenarios_executed.result: FAIL - App crashes immediately when loading 2 existing items from context

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix react-window API compatibility. Two options: (1) Downgrade react-window to 1.8.x which uses v1 API, OR (2) Update ScanItems.jsx to use react-window 2.x API (rowCount, rowHeight, rowProps, rowComponent)
Consider also downgrading React from 19 to 18 for better compatibility, OR upgrading react-window when React 19 support is added
After fix, verify mobile virtualized list renders items correctly
Run full scan flow test: login -> location -> scan items -> submit -> view submitted
critical_code_review_comments: ScanItems.jsx lines 1-3: Import { List as FixedSizeList } from 'react-window' - naming is confusing. In v2.x it's just 'List', but code uses v1 API
ScanItems.jsx lines 1923-1943: Uses itemCount/itemSize/itemData/children pattern from react-window v1.x, but package.json has react-window 2.2.7 which uses rowCount/rowHeight/rowProps/rowComponent
package.json: react-window ^2.2.7 with React ^19.0.0 - incompatible peer dependencies (react-window only supports React 15-18)

success_rate.backend: N/A - backend testing skipped per request

seed_data_creation: None - app crashes before any new data can be created
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRITICAL: App crashes due to react-window API mismatch. Main agent must fix the library version or update the code to use v2.x API before any testing can proceed. The previous bug fixes (Bug 1 and Bug 2 from iterations 1-2) CANNOT be verified due to this crash.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: react-window 2.2.7 uses a completely different API than version 1.x. The code was written for v1.x API but the package was upgraded to v2.x without updating the code.
rca_of_the_issue.crash_location: react-window/dist/react-window.js line 457: Object.values(e) where e is undefined (rowProps is undefined because itemData was passed instead)
fix_options: Option 1: Downgrade react-window to ^1.8.10 in package.json, run yarn install
Option 2: Update ScanItems.jsx to use react-window 2.x API - change itemCount to rowCount, itemSize to rowHeight, itemData to rowProps, children to rowComponent
